rawOutput:
<Form onSubmit="submit">
  <Column>
    <Input type="email" bind="email" required placeholder="请输入邮箱" />
    <Input type="password" bind="password" required placeholder="请输入密码" />
    <Checkbox bind="remember">记住我</Checkbox>
    <Button variant="primary" onTap="submit">登录</Button>
    <Link onTap="forgot" variant="subtle">忘记密码？</Link>
  </Column>
</Form>
